intro: A Global Trade System terminal is humming loudly.
speaker: Scientist
introDialogue: Hey! Are you tired of the same old same old?$I have an experimental upgrade for the GTS, wanna give it a try?
title: GTS Malfunction
description: A Scientist is testing an experimental GTS upgrade. It definitely sounds safe. Probably.

1.label: Sure!
1.tooltip: Shuffle Pokemon between both players, then battle the displaced trades
1.selected: You both agree to try the experimental upgrade.

2.label: No Thanks
2.selected:
No thanks, that sounds sketchy.
The Scientist sighs and starts unplugging cables.

tradeStart: The Scientist flips a switch.$The GTS terminal crackles as both teams are pulled into an unexpected trade queue!
battleStart: Oh no! I think I must have disconnected a lot of active trades!$A group of very angry Pokemon come tumbling out of the GTS!
